name: network-failure-diagnoser
description: Diagnose CCE Service, DNS/CoreDNS, Ingress, NetworkPolicy, ELB backend, EIP, NAT, and VPC network failures with Markdown reports.

tools.name: huawei_network_failure_diagnose
tools.description: Run huawei_network_failure_diagnose through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
